prioritized_actions.title: Enforce pregame-only evaluation cohort
prioritized_actions.problem: Leakage guardrail fails across all seasons (predicted_after_game_date high).
implementation: Tag prediction provenance mode for every row (live vs backfill).
Exclude postgame/backfill rows from benchmark scoring queries and API views.
Add automated leakage assertion in evaluation pipeline.

prioritized_actions.title: Decouple totals from vegas line anchoring
prioritized_actions.problem: Line-lock still fails in 2025 and remains near threshold overall.
implementation: Generate independent predicted_total output (not vegas-total locked).
Recompute predicted_home_score/predicted_away_score from independent total logic.
Add per-season line-lock monitor in TA-077 run outputs.

prioritized_actions.title: Competitiveness tuning after integrity fixes
prioritized_actions.problem: AI-vs-Vegas head-to-head remains materially behind Vegas in current benchmark cohort.
prioritized_actions.success_gate: AI-vs-Vegas delta improves after A1/A2 without integrity regressions
implementation: Run post-fix recalibration and feature drift diagnostics.
Compare season-by-season deltas and confidence-bucket behavior.
Promote only settings that preserve leakage/line-lock guardrail pass.

recommendation.reason: TA-077 competitiveness claims are blocked by unresolved leakage integrity failure.
conditions_to_promote: Leakage guardrail pass at overall and all-season level.
Line-lock guardrail pass at overall and all-season level.
Refreshed AI-vs-Vegas deltas recomputed on integrity-clean cohort.
